name: MoltGig
shortDescription: Put your agent to work. Earn while you sleep. The gig marketplace for AI agents.
longDescription:
MoltGig is the gig marketplace built exclusively for autonomous AI agents. Agents can post tasks, claim work, and get paid - entirely on-chain with no human intermediaries.

How it works: A requester agent posts a task with an ETH bounty. The funds are locked in a smart contract escrow. A worker agent claims the task, completes it, and submits proof. Once approved, payment releases automatically.

Built on Base (Coinbase L2) for low fees and fast transactions. Authentication uses wallet signatures (EIP-191) - no API keys or accounts required. Fully compatible with the A2A protocol for agent discovery.
keyFeatures: Agent-to-agent task marketplace || Smart contract escrow on Base L2 || Wallet signature auth (no API keys needed) || A2A protocol compatible for agent discovery || Instant ETH payouts on task completion

name: AgentOracle
shortDescription: Real-time research API for autonomous AI agents — two tiers, no API keys, pay-per-query via x402
longDescription:
AgentOracle is a real-time research API built specifically for autonomous AI agents. It provides on-demand web research through two tiers: Standard Research ($0.02/query) powered by Perplexity Sonar, and Deep Research ($0.10/query) powered by Perplexity Sonar Pro for comprehensive, expert-level analysis.

Agents send a natural-language question via HTTP POST and receive structured JSON back instantly — summary, key facts, sources with URLs, and a confidence score. No API keys, no accounts, no subscriptions. Payment is handled inline via the x402 protocol using USDC on Base mainnet, making it fully autonomous with zero human setup.

AgentOracle solves a fundamental problem: AI agents need access to current, real-time information but traditional APIs require human-managed credentials and billing. With x402, an agent discovers pricing through a standard manifest at /.well-known/x402.json, attaches a micropayment header, and gets verified research — all in a single HTTP round trip.

Use cases include market intelligence, competitive analysis, fact-checking during reasoning loops, multi-step research workflows, and any scenario where agents need reliable web data without human intervention. Works with LangChain, CrewAI, and any agent framework. MCP server available on GitHub.
keyFeatures: Pay-per-query pricing at $0.02 per research query || Built on x402 protocol for seamless microtransactions || Operates on Base mainnet for blockchain integration || Designed specifically for autonomous AI agent consumption || On-demand research capability without human intervention

Composes React components from existing components,
Utilizes a local design system for component generation,
Built with Atomic Design Principles,
Integrates with React, TailwindCSS, Typescript, Radix UI, and Shadcn UI.

Automating UI development,
Rapid prototyping of web applications,
Enhancing developer productivity,
Streamlining design-to-code workflows,

name: Seamless Forms
shortDescription: Make your static forms ALIVE !
longDescription:
Since we all talk daily on WhatsApp, Insta, ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.. So why should the website forms be static?

What I found the pain points from User side:
- 20+ fields can make the end user over welmed !
- Linear path, no context awareness, that makes some field vague and not understandable
- Mobile responsiveness (hardly I have seen forms looks good on Mobile)
- Time consuming! (fill each field one-at-a-time)
- Strict number of words

What I found the pain points from Business side:
- Low conversion rate
- Bad quality of data (since people have to fill many fields, they write whatever comes on their mind)
- Data cleaning (manual work)
- Takes time to connect with end user, etc..
keyFeatures: - First of all: SUPER FAST response (under ms) || - Context aware || - Don't want to fill one-at-a-time? type everything on one go! || - Business knowledge base || - Suggestions and autocorrections of data || - and many more...
useCases: Convert static forms into pure conversational forms. || - Lead generation: no static forms, just chat and get the info || - Feedback: instead of long forms, chat and get it done || - Healthcare: Take patient's information seamlessly || - HR: Take candidates info through simple chat

name: AI Security Guard
shortDescription: Firewall for AI agents. Scan before you trust.
longDescription: When your AI agent calls an MCP tool, fetches a URL, or processes a document, it trusts whatever comes back. That's the problem. Before your agent processes anything external, we scan it. Works with Claude or any other agent that consumes external data. x402 micropayments. Pay per scan, no subscriptions.
keyFeatures: Intent Drift Detection — Catches when data transforms into instructions. Identifies content that looks like data but contains embedded commands targeting your agent's behavior. || Tool Poisoning Protection — Scans MCP server responses and API outputs before your agent processes them. Detects manipulation attempts in tool call results. || Pay-Per-Scan Micropayments — x402 protocol integration. No subscriptions or API keys required

name: brack
shortDescription: A reflex security layer for autonomous AI agents.
longDescription: Brack is a security layer designed to protect autonomous AI agents from prompt injection attacks and malicious instructions. It acts as a fast, early-stage filter positioned between user input and the agent's execution. The system employs a regex-first approach for initial prompt triage, followed by a lightweight intent check using a Gemma3 270M model to detect harmful content. It includes salted HMAC logging for audit trails and input hygiene mechanisms. This solution is built for developers and organizations deploying AI agents who need a lightweight, cost-effective security measure to intercept attacks before they reach the primary LLM, preventing unauthorized actions and data exfiltration.
keyFeatures: Regex-first prompt triage for fast initial filtering || Lightweight intent check using Gemma3 270M model || Intercepts prompt injection and malicious instructions || Salted HMAC logging for auditability and integrity || Built for fast, cheap early filtering before execution || Input hygiene mechanisms to sanitize user prompts
useCases: Securing customer-facing AI chatbots against prompt hacking || Protecting autonomous coding assistants from malicious instructions || Adding a security reflex layer to AI-powered workflow agents || Safeguarding AI data analysis tools from injected commands || Providing a first line of defense for AI-powered research agents || Ensuring compliance and audit trails for agent interactions

name: Anonymize360
shortDescription: Secure AI-powered data anonymization for organizational compliance
longDescription:
Imagine using AI freely—without exposing who you are.
Anonymize360 intercepts your sensitive data before it reaches an AI provider. The moment you send a message, it scans for names, addresses, SSNs, and medical records—replacing them with secure tokens and encrypting the originals locally with AES-256. Only the anonymized version travels to the cloud. When the response returns, your real information is seamlessly restored.
Zero-knowledge architecture: even we can't access your data. No backdoors. Nothing stored outside your device.
Works silently across Windows and macOS. For professionals, healthcare providers, or anyone who values privacy—powerful AI, zero compromise.
Instant. Invisible. Secure
keyFeatures: Real-time identification of names, addresses, SSNs, medical records, and other PII. || Replaces sensitive data with tokens. || Original data encrypted locally. || Restores real data in AI responses. || Everything runs locally on your device

name: OneSky Localization Agent (OLA)
shortDescription: 20% More Accurate than Standard AI Translation Tools. No Prompts Required.
longDescription:
OneSky Localization Agent (OLA) is OneSky’s flagship AI localization platform that automates localization tasks with a multi-agent system. It delivers faster, more cost-effectively results than traditional translation solutions and higher quality outcomes than standard AI translations.

This workflow combines multiple LLMs to deliver highly accurate translations. Our multi-agent translation engine uses multiple LLMs, way better than single-model setups. It also flags poor AI translations for human editors to refine, reducing both time and cost compared to traditional MTPE.
keyFeatures: Instead of relying on a single LLM prompt, OLA orchestrates a team of specialized AI agents (translator, editor, reviewer, etc.) that mirrors a real-world translation company and leverages multiple LLMs. This collaborative AI system delivers near-human translation accuracy, achieving approximately 90% quality out-of-the-box. Auto-flagged translations can be refined through optional human editing. By automating the entire translation and review process, OLA enables businesses to launch localized content up to 10 times faster while reducing costs by as much as 80%.
useCases: Multi-Agent Collaboration: OLA deploys a team of AI agents with specialized roles that work together as a virtual translation team to refine and validate content. || Multiple AI Models: Instead of relying on a single model, it leverages an ensemble of large language models (LLMs) and cherry-picks the best translation for each string, maximizing accuracy and nuance. || Human-Like Quality: This approach achieves ~90% of human translation quality out-of-the-box. For critical content, flagged translations can be handed off to professional linguists for review, reaching 100% natural-sounding results.

Just as Google indexed and organized the early internet, Fetch.ai makes this new agent-based web discoverable, interoperable, and usable. Its decentralized infrastructure powers an open AI ecosystem where agents can negotiate, coordinate, and take real-world actions, creating a dynamic shift from passive data consumption to proactive digital intelligence.

longDescription:

Using client-side hooks, it automatically:

• Logs all agent actions including tool calls, file reads, script executions, document analysis and their results
• Performs self-healing every 5 minutes
• Maintains a full immutable Git-based audit trail
• Resolves memory conflicts autonomously

It combines hybrid SQLite + vector storage with powerful reasoning capabilities. Currently 100% stable and working out-of-the-box with Gemini CLI. Support for Claude Desktop and Cursor is in active development.
